column8: If__________(you/do) your homework last night, you'd know the answer to this question!
column9: We___________(not/stand) by the side of the road at the moment trying to get a lift if_________(we/bring) a spare tyre with us.
column10: If I____________(not/stay up) so late last night, I______________(not/feel) so tired this morning!
column11: ____________(I/be) in terrible trouble right now if you_____________(not/help) me.
column12: If I had a video recorder,_____________(I/record) the match last night.
column13: ____________(I/ask) for Andy's phone number when I met him if I_____________(not/already/have) a boyfriend!
column14: If Cody_____________(not/live) so far away, he__________(not/be) so late to the barbecue yesterday.
column15: Tracy___________(not/need) extra lessons last month if she_________(be) as good as you are.
column16: ____________(you/got) a job when you left school if the university ___________(not/offer) you a place?
column17: If you_____________(have) as much money as she does,____________(you/retire) by now?
